testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('text=Upgrade to Pro') Expected: visible Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Upgrade to Pro') resolved to 5 elements: 1)

Make it count! Upgrade to Pro for unlimited CV ge…

aka getByText('Make it count! Upgrade to Pro') 2) Upgrade to Pro aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Upgrade to Pro', exact: true }) 3) … aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Upgrade to Pro - £2.99/month' }).first() 4)

Upgrade to Pro

aka getByRole('paragraph').filter({ hasText: /^Upgrade to Pro$/ }) 5) … aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Upgrade to Pro - £2.99/month' }).nth(1) Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Upgrade to Pro') 216 | // Verify usage limit banner shows 0 remaining 217 | await expect(page.locator('text=0 Free Generation')).toBeVisible() > 218 | .catch(() => expect(page.locator('text=Upgrade to Pro')).toBeVisible()) | ^ 219 | 220 | console.log('✅ Usage tracking updated correctly') 221 | at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:218:64 at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:217:5 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page ✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page 📍 Step 8: Testing review page... ✓ Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/a44ab4bf-cc5b-4252-8ee4-3a4ac15ea420 ✓ Confirmed on review page ✓ Screenshot saved: review-page.png ⚠️ Download button not immediately visible - checking for other elements ✅ Review page loaded successfully 📍 Step 9: Verifying usage tracking...
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md]]

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
56 | 57 | // Wait for onboarding modal to appear > 58 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 59 | 60 | // Verify 3-step process is shown 61 | await expect(page.locator('text=Upload → Generate → Download')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:58:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\error-context.md

📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page ✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page 📍 Step 8: Testing review page... ✓ Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/1656e739-e31c-4360-ad18-46fb6dc08f3c ✓ Confirmed on review page ✓ Screenshot saved: review-page.png ⚠️ Download button not immediately visible - checking for other elements ✅ Review page loaded successfully 📍 Step 9: Verifying usage tracking...

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:246:7 Verify onboarding cannot be skipped

testcase.failure:
[webkit] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:246:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify onboarding cannot be skipped
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
255 | 256 | // Verify onboarding modal appears > 257 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible() | ^ 258 | 259 | // Verify no escape routes 260 | await expect(page.locator('button:has-text("Skip")')).not.toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:257:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-4545f-nboarding-cannot-be-skipped-webkit\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-4545f-nboarding-cannot-be-skipped-webkit\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

aka getByRole('paragraph').filter({ hasText: /^Upgrade to Pro$/ }) 5) … aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Upgrade to Pro - £2.99/month' }).nth(1) Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Upgrade to Pro') 216 | // Verify usage limit banner shows 0 remaining 217 | await expect(page.locator('text=0 Free Generation')).toBeVisible() > 218 | .catch(() => expect(page.locator('text=Upgrade to Pro')).toBeVisible()) | ^ 219 | 220 | console.log('✅ Usage tracking updated correctly') 221 | at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:218:64 at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:217:5 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Chrome\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Chrome\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Chrome\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page ✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page 📍 Step 8: Testing review page... ✓ Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/review/57f0d0a4-7bd4-4c76-9311-d7621fda6577 ✓ Confirmed on review page ✓ Screenshot saved: review-page.png ⚠️ Download button not immediately visible - checking for other elements ✅ Review page loaded successfully 📍 Step 9: Verifying usage tracking...
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Chrome\test-failed-1.png]]

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Safari] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Test timeout of 240000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForURL: Test timeout of 240000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/review/**" until "load" ============================================================
171 | 172 | // Wait for redirect to review page - this takes several minutes > 173 | await page.waitForURL('**/review/**', { timeout: 180000 }) | ^ 174 | 175 | console.log('✅ CV generated successfully and redirected to review page') 176 | at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:173:16

(this takes ~60 seconds) ✓ CV parsed successfully ✓ Clicked "Looks Good - Continue" ✅ Redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details on generation page... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 2-3 minutes)... ⏳ Please be patient - generation includes AI processing and redirect to review page
